understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver selectable pieces (P/S) onto goal positions (+) within a limited step budget per level, as indicated by level progress and steps_remaining.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shifts the selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell if unblocked, sometimes pushing adjacent pushable objects (likely B=blocks); walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [x,y], enabling control of multiple pieces; some actions fail without movement due to blocks or boundaries, and heuristics like movement.{direction}_blocked provide hints but aren't definitive.
